title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates!
